titleStmt.title: SII 27.60: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 60. (A.R. No. 606 of 1929-30.) KŌḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Patel's house in the village.
This slightly damaged record is dated Śaka 1[3]01, Siddhārthi, Jyēshṭha, śu. 1, Tuesday corresponding to 1379 A.D., May 17.

It registers the gift of land in Kōḍi to Narasiṁha-sāhu, son of [Kaṭṭi]-sāhu of Brahmāra by Nāgappa-voḍeya, his younger brother Sāyaṇṇa and son Nāgaṇṇa-daṇṇāyka when [Bommarsa-voḍeya] was governing Bārakūru-rājya. The donee and others also seem to have made gifts to god Siddhanāthadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya na
garāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1301 neya
ra bruhaspatiyida siddhārthi saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha śuddha 1 maṁgaḷavāradalu śrīmanmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣage tappuva rāyaragaṁḍa
haraharamahārāyara vijeya rājyābhyudaya dilu rāyana nirūpadiṁ
hā pradhānaṁ boṁmarsa voḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu
[bra hmā]rada kamsāhuvina makkaḷu narasiṁhasāhuviṁge nāgappavoḍeyaru ta
mma sāyaṁṇanavaru Ā nāgappanavara makkaḷu nāgaṁṇa daṁṇāykanū yi mūvaru yē
śastharāgi baḍagaṇa kōḍiyoḷage bhūtaiyana maga Alvana harahiya
śiddāyada kāhina mūlada bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu
ḍuvalu teṁkalu Alvana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudradiṁ mūḍa baḍagalu
kuḍukeya vaidyara bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi catussīme yoḷaguḷḷa bāḷu bittuva be
de gēṇalu yikhaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 10 hāne 10 bittuvabāḷu Avva koḷake
mane mane ṭhāu Eḍaveyoḷu tuṁgña Avara makkaḷu yi bāḷu makkimarane
pāṣāṇanidhi nikṣēpasiddha sādhya Akṣīṇi Āgāmi tējasāṁmya Aṣṭabhōga sa
hita Ā narasiṁhvaṇa rākayiyali Ardha parichēdavāgi koṁḍu mūlaparichēda
dhārāpūrvvavāgi mūlavaneṟidu koṭṭeU yi bāḷiṁge
Ā narasingaṇnana Appaṇeyaṁda siddhanātha dēvarige nāḍanūṟanālvattu hāne
Akkiyanū tettu bāḷuvaru Aja narasiṁgaṁṇna A ṁṭiya habbakke voṁdu te
ṁginakāya kāṇikeyanū koṭṭubahadu yi bāḷiṁge Akara Anāya Āvudū
sallaveṁdu sarvvamāṁnyaveṁdu barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsana . kuḍukeya vaidyara bā
ḷu bittuva bede gēṇalu yikhaṁḍugadalu kke siṁgaṇna na Appa
ṇeyaṁda siddhanātha dēvarige nāḍa 70 hāne Akkiyanū koḍuvanu
ṟa koṁṭiya habbakka voṁdu teṁginakāyi kāṇikeyanū vaḍḍara viṭhappanū
koṭṭu bahanu . Uḷi nāḍanūṟaAyivattu hāne Akkiyanū
Allappana maga singaṁṇna
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
